prompt: Grill me on the architecture of this skills repo — I'm thinking of adding a CI/CD pipeline that auto-runs evals on every PR.

assertions.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
Agent explored the codebase before the first question
